title: Changing spatial patterns of paratyphoid fever in South Korea, 2001-2024: analysis code and derived data
description: Analysis code and derived district-year data reproducing the spatial-autocorrelation description and the negative-binomial Bayesian spatiotemporal (BYM + RW1 + IID) model for paratyphoid fever in South Korea, 2001-2024, across 223 connected districts under queen contiguity. Accompanies the manuscript by Lee and Kim. Fitted with R-INLA; random seed 20260713.

creators.name: Lee, MinSoo
creators.affiliation: School of Bio-Health Convergence, Hongik University, Seoul, Republic of Korea

creators.name: Kim, Seongdae
creators.affiliation: School of Bio-Health Convergence, Hongik University, Seoul, Republic of Korea
